subcodes.title: Commentary on the Dala'il-i-Sab'ih of the Bab
subcodes.first_line: The seal of the Choice Wine hath been broken through My Name, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed are they that recognize it as the Kawthar of the All-Merciful... His Word - exalted and glorious be He - is among the most perfect proofs of the knowledge of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فتح ختم رحیق المختوم باسمی القیوم طوبی لقوم یعرفون انه لکوثر الرحمن ...قوله جل و عز از جمله ادلاء متقنه علم کل شیء است
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Word of God is its own standard
